iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 13:04 - CRITICAL 54. Iran explicitly refuses all negotiation channels. Prolonged war desperation risk rising. Proliferation incentive grows as regime survival threatened by 6000+ US combat missions.

Iran calls fuel depot strikes ecocide. Germany flatly refuses Hormuz deployment. 1348 Iran civilians dead, 850 Lebanon, 13 US troops.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Israel Katz announces ground maneuver - formal escalation from limited ground ops. Qantara strike kills 4 incl 2 children. 850+ dead, 800K displaced. Week 3, expanding offensive.

turkey.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 88. Germany refuses Hormuz: not our war. NATO alliance strain deepening. Japan/Australia refuse ships. Incirlik narrative intensifying. Trump threatens NATO future.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 86. NATO rift widens (Germany refuses Hormuz). Putin benefits from Western disunity. France sends SAMP/T NG to Ukraine.

china.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 34 (w/coupling). Trump may delay Xi summit. China stance on Hormuz unclear. US-China friction over ME crisis.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 76. Kim observed 10+ missile test timed after THAAD redeployment. Strategic gap exploitation. No new signals in past hour.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Russia barrages Ukraine, 6 killed, 760 Russian losses in 24h. France SAMP/T NG deployment. Zelensky awaits trilateral talks.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Kandahar strikes continue. 118K displaced. Deadliest phase. 100 (capped).

top_signals: Israel expands ground offensive - Katz announces formal ground maneuver in southern Lebanon, escalating from limited ops

Iran FM Araghchi explicitly refuses ceasefire/negotiation: never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation
Germany flatly refuses Hormuz deployment - Pistorius: This is not our war, we did not start it
Japan and Australia refuse to send warships; UK noncommittal (mine-hunting drones only)
Iran FM calls Israeli strikes on fuel depots ecocide - escalatory legal/rhetoric framing
Brent crude hits $106/barrel amid Hormuz selective blockade
Trump threatens to postpone Xi summit if China refuses Hormuz help; threatens NATO future
Death toll: 1348 Iran civilians, 850 Lebanon, 13 US service members - no ceasefire in sight
DPRK exploits US security gap - 10+ missiles fired timed after THAAD redeployment from South Korea

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 13:04): Israel formally escalates Lebanon ground ops to ground maneuver. Iran explicitly rejects ALL negotiation. CENTCOM confirms 6000+ combat missions. Germany/Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz coalition. NATO alliance strain widening. Brent $106. Death toll rising. ZERO de-escalation channels active. Global score 93 RISING at IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: Israel expands ground offensive in southern Lebanon - ground maneuver announced
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Israel Katz announces ground maneuver in southern Lebanon, escalating from limited operations. Fears of sweeping invasion intensify. Israel rebuffs French/Lebanese de-escalation.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM: 6000+ US combat missions in 16 days, 100+ Iranian vessels destroyed
latest_news.text: Adm. Brad Cooper shows before/after photos of destroyed Iranian missile factories. Kharg Island: 90+ targets destroyed. Goal: destroy Iran ability to fight back.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM rejects ceasefire entirely - ready to defend as long as it takes
latest_news.text: Araghchi tells CBS: ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes. Denies Trump claim Iran wants deal. No diplomatic off-ramp visible.

latest_news.headline: Germany flatly refuses Hormuz deployment - This is not our war
latest_news.text: German Defense Minister Pistorius refuses Hormuz request. Japan and Australia also refuse. NATO alliance strain deepening.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM calls Israeli strikes on fuel depots ecocide
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi labels Israeli strikes on fuel depots and oil infrastructure as ecocide - escalatory legal framing.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude hits $106/barrel as Hormuz blockade persists
latest_news.text: Brent crude briefly reached $106. Global energy prices continue to climb. US Energy Secretary acknowledges prices could remain elevated.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to postpone Xi summit over Hormuz refusal
latest_news.text: Trump threatens to postpone planned Beijing summit with Xi if China refuses to send warships to Hormuz. Also warns NATO faces very bad future.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION (Day 18 13:04) - Global war probability 93%. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100: 6000+ US combat missions, Iran rejects all ceasefire. Brent $106. Germany flatly refuses Hormuz: not our war. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 100: Formal ground maneuver announced. 850+ dead, 800K displaced. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100: Ongoing barrage. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100. (5) DPRK IMMINENT 76. (6) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 86: NATO rift deepens. (7) TURKEY IMMINENT 88. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 54: No-negotiation path increases proliferation desperation. KEY: NATO alliance fracturing in real-time. Germany not our war statement is most explicit NATO split since conflict began. Trump threatening Xi summit adds US-China friction. Iran total refusal to negotiate removes only plausible de-escalation channel.
